sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, description CLOB, value INT);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, description, value) VALUES (1, 'test' || space(3), 10), (2, NULL || space(2), 20), (3, 'sample' || space(0), NULL);
SELECT id, description, value, space(value) AS space_desc FROM test_table WHERE value < 15;
SELECT id, description, value FROM test_table WHERE description LIKE '%' || space(2) || 's' AND value < (SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_table);
SELECT id, COUNT(*) FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING space(value) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT t1.id, t1.description, t1.value FROM test_table t1 JOIN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value < 20) AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.id AND t1.description < 'test' || space(1);
SELECT id, MIN(CASE WHEN description IS NULL THEN space(value) ELSE description END) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY id HAVING MIN(value) < 20;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY description) AS cnt FROM test_table WHERE space(value) > '    ';
CREATE TABLE another_table (outer_id INT, outer_description CLOB);
INSERT INTO another_table (outer_id, outer_description) VALUES (1, 'outer ' || space(5)), (2, NULL || space(3));
SELECT a.outer_id, a.outer_description, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE space(value) IS NOT NULL AND id < a.outer_id) FROM another_table a ORDER BY a.outer_id < 2;
ALTER TABLE test_table ADD COLUMN extra_value FLOAT;
UPDATE test_table SET extra_value = value * 1.5 WHERE description IS NOT NULL AND id < 3;
SELECT MAX(extra_value) AS max_val FROM test_table WHERE value < (SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_table);
